falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 4500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key historical resistance would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index drops below 20 for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained ultra-low volatility would contradict the blowoff score of 40, indicating market complacency rather than impending turbulence, falsifying the UNKNOWN phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An unexpected aggressive rate cut would create clear directional bias, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
